title: Inclusion of bonds in mortgage certificates
doc_html:
§74.  Inclusion of bonds in mortgage certificates

The clerks of court in preparing mortgage certificates shall not include notarial bonds thereon unless an action has been commenced on the bond and a notice of lis pendens has been filed in connection therewith as provided in R.S. 35:73.
doc_text:
§74.  Inclusion of bonds in mortgage certificates
The clerks of court in preparing mortgage certificates shall not include notarial bonds thereon unless an action has been commenced on the bond and a notice of lis pendens has been filed in connection therewith as provided in R.S. 35:73.
